subcodes.title: Words spoken en route in carriage in Budapest, 1913-04-13
subcodes.first_line: For nine years He [Bahá'u'lláh] did not see a green leaf. He loved nature. His sensibilities and powers of observation were miraculous. The tips of His fingers were the most sensitive parts of His holy temple.
subcodes.subjects: @banishment to; life in 'Akka, @power of the Manifestation of God, @suffering and imprisonment
